title: Show-off Kenyan Almond Stir-fry
description: A floral and silky dish featuring almond essence with a low-sodium twist, perfect for adding to any dinner menu.
instructions: Prepare almonds by lightly toasting them in a dry skillet until fragrant and slightly golden. Let cool.
In a large wok or frying pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onions and minced garlic; stir-fry for about 2 minutes until onions are translucent.
Add salt and pepper to taste. Stir into the onion-garlic mixture.
Fold in lightly seasoned chicken pieces, ensuring they are evenly coated with the spice blend. Sauté for another 4-5 minutes or until the chicken is slightly golden on all sides.
Remove chicken from wok; set aside.
Add cooled almonds to the same pan and stir-fry over high heat for about 1 minute.
Deglaze the pan with lime juice, adding a splash of lemon juice. Stir in freshly grated ginger.
Return the cooked chicken back into the pan along with any accumulated juices from the wok. Mix well until everything is evenly coated with the sauce and spices.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
